title: Artland - Simplicity Salad Bowl - 5 Litre - Cylinder Glass Bowl- Simplicity Range- Mouth Blown & Hand Crafted, Gift Boxed
features: BEAUTIFUL SIMPLE DESIGN: Part of our Simplicity collection, this gorgeous large, deep, and straight sided serving bowl, is made of beautifully clear glass. This cylinder salad bowl is both sophisticated and highly functional, aiding your entertaining needs. Our handcrafted quality glass bowls are ideal for everyday kitchen use, as well as for fine dining

SOPHISTICATED CENTREPIECE BOWL: This elegant decorative bowl is ideal not only as a salad bowl, but also as a centre piece- it looks stunning as a fruit bowl or sweet bowl in a modern kitchen, or as a pot pourri bowl, releasing a gorgeous scent throughout your home. You could also use it as a glass dessert bowl or trifle bowl for dinners where you are looking to impress guests!

HIGH-QUALITY CRAFTSMANSHIP: We believe in high-quality glassware which is why our salad bowl has been crafted by mouth-blown glass! This glass forming technique uses skilled craftsman who handcrafts the glass by working molten glass into its final decorative form! What results is high quality and durable glass craft which sits nicely as a centrepiece at the dinner table or as a part of a kitchen set

ARTLAND GLASS CARE AND DIMENSIONS:The bowl's dimensions are: 22.9 x 22.9 x 12.7 centimetres- our salad bowls are the perfect size to include within your kitchen glass set. Our glass salad bowl is hand wash only. This gorgeous large serving bowl is chic, yet robust- the serving dish is the perfect addition to your glassware collection

THE IDEAL GLASS GIFT FOR KITCHEN LOVERS: This sleek and stylish glass bowl makes for a perfect gift! It comes gift boxed for your convenience, so all you need to take care of is the wrapping! Let your creativity come out this Christmas with our decorative glass bowls- you could even use it as a glass vase, filled with baubles or fairy lights for a centrepiece!
